text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "SharpView.exe is a known offensive security tool used for Active Directory reconnaissance. The command line 'Get-ObjectAcl -SamAccountName \"Domain Admins\"' explicitly attempts to enumerate permissions for the 'Domain Admins' group, which is a common tactic in the early stages of an attack. The creation of temporary files and loading of a dynamically named DLL in the AppData\\Local\\Temp directory further supports this malicious activity.",
  "indicators": [
    "SharpView.exe",
    "Active Directory reconnaissance",
    "Get-ObjectAcl",
    "Domain Admins",
    "AppData\\Local\\Temp",
    "dynamically named DLL"
  ]
}
